◎简　　介  

　　Minnie and Moskowitz is a film by John Cassavetes, starring his wife, Gena Rowlands, and actor Seymour Cassel in the title roles of Minnie and Moskowitz, respectively.Following a www. aiyoutv.com break-up, Minnie Moore, a museum curator, becomes disillusioned by love and meaningful relationships.
